user.title: Fuel Price Sensor
user.description: Enter the base URL of a compatible fuel price service and the city you want to track.

station.title: Select station
station.description: Choose a specific station to track, or select 'Cheapest' to always show the cheapest available price.

fuel_types.title: Select fuel types
fuel_types.description: Choose which fuel types you want to track.

error.city_not_found: City not found at the given URL
error.no_fuel_types: Select at least one fuel type
